Small ingredient. Essential role.

THE DEFENSE THAT COMPOUNDS

Stimulant use puts demands on your body's antioxidant systems. Mustard seed activates sulforaphane production — your body's built-in defense against the resulting oxidative stress.
SEE WHAT'S INSIDE STASIS

MUSTARD SEED HAS A JOB TO DO

Stasis Day includes 50mg of Mustard Seed because it contains the enzyme myrosinase.

Myrosinase converts glucoraphanin (from broccoli seed) into sulforaphane.

Without myrosinase, that conversion is limited. With it, your body can actually produce sulforaphane efficiently.
GET THE ACTIVATED FORMULA

WHY THAT MATTERS
FOR STIMULANT USERS

Sulforaphane has been studied for its role in supporting the body's antioxidant defenses and helping protect against oxidative stress.*

Daily cognitive demand — and stimulant use can increase oxidative load in the brain.

Supporting antioxidant systems helps maintain cellular health under that demand.*

Mustard Seed makes that protection possible.

SHOP STASIS DAY
STASIS + STIMULANT

BALANCE FOR BOLD MINDS

SHOP NOW

*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease. Consult your healthcare provider before beginning a new supplement, especially if you have a medical condition or are taking medication.
